demo.name: Minor Necklace of Vitality
description: Priests of ancient people once wore necklaces like these as a mark of devotion to a fertility god.

demo.name: Minor Amulet of Stamina
description: Once, a brave warrior who had a similar amulet challenged a monster.
He fought it for three days and three nights and finally won.
Some say he collapsed from exhaustion, dead atop the beast's corpse.
